query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_ai_analyses` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `org_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `run_uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('QUEUED','RUNNING','COMPLETED','FAILED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'QUEUED',
  `mode` enum('FAST','DEEP') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'FAST',
  `model` varchar(128),
  `input_hash` varchar(64),
  `summary_md` text,
  `output_json` json,
  `quality_score` int,
  `job_id` int,
  `error` text,
  `created_by` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_ai_analyses_org_run (`org_id`, `run_uid`, `created_at` DESC),
  INDEX idx_ai_analyses_run_uid (`run_uid`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_ai_segments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `org_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `analysis_uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `segment_type` enum('DROP_CALL','LOW_THROUGHPUT','HO_FAIL','HIGH_LATENCY','COVERAGE_HOLE','INTERFERENCE','BACKHAUL','DNS','GPS_GAP','OTHER') NOT NULL,
  `start_ts` timestamp NULL,
  `end_ts` timestamp NULL,
  `geo_bbox_json` json,
  `evidence_json` json,
  `diagnosis_md` text,
  `actions_json` json,
  `confidence` double,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_ai_segments_analysis (`org_id`, `analysis_uid`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_ai_feedback` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `org_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `analysis_uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `score` int NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `created_by` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_ai_feedback_analysis (`analysis_uid`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_ai_handoffs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `org_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `analysis_uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('OPEN','ASSIGNED','RESOLVED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
  `assigned_to_user_uid` varchar(64),
  `notes` text,
  `created_by` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_ai_handoffs_analysis (`analysis_uid`)
);

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,

  `analysis_uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `segment_type` enum('DROP_CALL','LOW_THROUGHPUT','HO_FAIL','HIGH_LATENCY','COVERAGE_HOLE','INTERFERENCE','BACKHAUL','DNS','GPS_GAP','OTHER') NOT NULL,
  `start_ts` timestamp NULL,
  `end_ts` timestamp NULL,
  `geo_bbox_json` json,
  `evidence_json` json,
  `diagnosis_md` text,
  `actions_json` json,
  `confidence` double,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_ai_segments_analysis (`org_id`, `analysis_uid`)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_ai_feedback` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `org_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `analysis_uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `score` int NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `created_by` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_ai_feedback_analysis (`analysis_uid`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_ai_handoffs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `org_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `analysis_uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('OPEN','ASSIGNED','RESOLVED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
  `assigned_to_user_uid` varchar(64),
  `notes` text,
  `created_by` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_ai_handoffs_analysis (`analysis_uid`)
);
